Cronos: Shift Scheduling & Payroll for Restaurants

From napkin sketches to 1,300 users and an acquisition in 18 months.

1,300Paying users
95%Retention
18 moZero to exit
Jump to: Building It The Product In the Wild The Exit | Skip to PRDs →
Building It

From WhatsApp Schedules to a Shipped Product

Colombian restaurants were managing shifts in group chats and payroll by hand. After user interviews across Bogotá, we shipped a full scheduling + payroll product on Bubble.io in under 3 months.

Shipped schedule — color-coded shifts by role, weekly view with labor cost summary.
Employee mobile view — upcoming shifts across locations.
Live tasks screen — role-assigned tasks with deadlines, in use at La Marianela.
The Product

Payroll & Tips, Built for Colombian Labor Law

Overtime, night surcharges, Sunday premiums, configurable tip distribution — every edge case handled and spec'd before a line of code was written.

"Tu Nómina" — payroll summary with base salary, novedades, deductions, and net pay.
Tips setup wizard — configure distribution method per location.
Propinas dashboard — daily input, calendar status, historical reports.
Tip liquidation — per-employee breakdown by hours and daily rate.
In the Wild

1,300 Users Across Colombia's Top Restaurants

Onboarding a new restaurant client.
Training session with restaurant staff.
At La Marianela — one of Cronos's early adopters.
The Exit

Acquired by Bibisoft

At 1,300 users, 95% retention, and a $300K seed offer on the table, we accepted an acquisition from POS provider Bibisoft — who saw Cronos as the missing workforce layer for their restaurant clients.

400+ direct mail pieces sent to Bogotá restaurants as part of our GTM push.

Cronos Clock-In Portal

AI-built with Replit · Shipped in <1 day

A production clock-in/clock-out portal for Cronos — built and deployed in under a day. Tested by real users, it performed on par with the version we built manually over weeks.

AI-builtReplitReal users
🔍

KYC Simulation Testing Agent

AI-built · Claude API · Inspired by Brex

Regression testing framework for AI-powered KYC/AML agents — generates synthetic applicant cohorts, injects 9 risk signals (OFAC hits, synthetic identities, velocity fraud), and scores Claude's detection recall against a baseline.

🔍 Live Dashboard →
AI-builtClaude APIFintechCompliance
🍕

SliceDex

AI-built · ElevenLabs · Claude API · NYC Pizza Price Tracker

An AI agent named Heather cold-calls every pizza shop in NYC to ask the price of a plain cheese slice — then maps the results. Inspired by The Guinndex.

🍕 Live Site →

About

I'm JP — a product builder, ex-founder, and NYU Stern Tech MBA. I co-founded Cronos, a shift scheduling and payroll platform for Colombia's restaurant industry, and took it from zero to acquisition in 18 months.

Before that, I spent 4 years at Synapse, an infrastructure fintech, where I grew from sales to a leadership role in the customer growth organization — managing enterprise LATAM bank accounts and building the internal processes (CRDs, NPS systems, QBRs) that connected customer needs to the product roadmap.

I'm Colombian, based in New York, and I believe the best products come from deep user empathy and a bias toward resolving the area of highest risk first. Outside of work, I'm a trained cook, play guitar, shoot on Fujifilm, and always have a book going.

Get in Touch

Always happy to connect — on projects, ideas, or just to chat. I respond within 24 hours.
